title: eucephalus engelmannii
intro: Eucephalus engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's aster or Engelmann's eucephalus, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties make it useful in herbal remedies, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eucephalus engelmannii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Eucephalus engelmannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
